trait.name: Stonehand Augmentation
entries: Derrik's right arm has been replaced with a powerful pre-war mechanical gauntlet reinforced with stone-like plating. Derrik has advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, and his unarmed strikes deal 9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Tactical Enforcer
entries: As a bonus action, Derrik grants one ally within 30 feet advantage on its next attack roll or ability check.

trait.name: Relentless (1/Day)
entries: When Derrik is reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, he drops to 1 hit point instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Derrik makes two melee attacks, one with his Stonehand Gauntlet and one with his longsword.

action.name: Stonehand Gauntlet
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}13 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) bludgeoning damage. On a hit, the target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage, or 12 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Shockwave Slam (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Derrik slams the ground with his Stonehand Gauntlet. Each creature within 10 feet of him must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

legendary.name: Commanding Presence
entries: Derrik grants one ally within 30 feet an immediate reaction to move up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Reinforced Counter
entries: When a creature within 5 feet of Derrik misses him with a melee attack, Derrik makes one melee attack against that creature.
